headline: CBRE Q1 Deep Dive: Infrastructure Services and Data Center Momentum Propel Growth
summary: Commercial real estate firm CBRE (NYSE:CBRE) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 18.6% year on year to $10.53 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.61 per share was 42.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on CBRE Group, Raises Price Target to $179
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains CBRE Group (NYSE:CBRE) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $163 to $179.

headline: Is Stronger Data Center And Infrastructure Momentum Altering The Investment Case For CBRE Group (CBRE)?
summary: CBRE Group, Inc. reported past first-quarter 2026 results with revenue of US$10,527 million and net income of US$318 million, and basic earnings per share from continuing operations of US$1.08, all higher than a year earlier. Management credited the outperformance to accelerating data center and critical infrastructure activities, while also lifting full-year earnings guidance on momentum in these resilient service lines. We’ll now examine how CBRE’s stronger data center and critical...

headline: CBRE Group Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: CBRE Group (NYSE:CBRE) reported first-quarter 2026 results that management said exceeded expectations, driven by strength across its services segments and an earlier-than-anticipated contribution from its data center land development program.
